title: Veen Doghantali Hi Tutena
subTitle: Samar, a wealthy tycoon, and Swanandi, a young middle-class professional, enter a marriage of convenience. However, their contractual nuptials gradually evolve into a profound connection.

title: Tula Japnar Aahe
subTitle: After Ambika's tragic death, her husband Atharva and daughter Veda are heartbroken. However, her spirit returns to watch over and protect Veda in unseen yet powerful ways.

title: Savlayachi Janu Savali
subTitle: A woman with a dusky complexion and a melodious voice faces various obstacles. Her life gets entangled with a man whose mother wants a beautiful bride for him.

title: Veen Doghantali Hi Tutena
subTitle: Samar, a wealthy tycoon, and Swanandi, a young middle-class professional, enter a marriage of convenience. However, their contractual nuptials gradually evolve into a profound connection.

title: Lakshmi Nivas
subTitle: Lakshmi is married to Shriniwas Dalvi, who belongs to a traditional joint family. While she strives to navigate challenges, she supports her husband's dreams.

title: Devmanus Madhla Adhyay
subTitle: The notorious serial killer, Dr Ajitkumar Dev, relocates to Varanasi where he assumes the identity of Gopal, a tailor who disappeared years ago, and continues his reign of terror.

title: Mazhi Tuzhi Reshimgaath
subTitle: Yash, a rich businessman, seeks true love. When he falls in love with Neha, a beautiful woman, he faces trouble winning her over.

subTitle: Samar, a wealthy tycoon, and Swanandi, a young middle-class professional, enter a marriage of convenience. However, their contractual nuptials gradually evolve into a profound connection.

title: Kamali
subTitle: Kamali and Ningi attempt to recover Annapurna's jewellery, countering Kamini's plot. However, their secret operation is thwarted when Kamini catches them red-handed.

title: Veen Doghantali Hi Tutena
subTitle: Swanandi rushes to help Anand, who's locked himself in a room and is considering suicide, while Samar tries to stop her. Meanwhile, Mallika stirs up Samar's anger even more.

subTitle: Jamkar explains taking Saket out to Sudhakar. However, when Saket mentions seeing Gopal, a panicked Gopal chases their car, leading Jamkar to uncover the truth about Saket's accident.
